did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article that discusses the fundamentals and applications of AI and machine learning in skin cancer diagnosis. It summarizes findings from other studies (e.g., Haenssle et al., Tschandl et al.) but does not perform original experiments or use AI/ML methods to obtain new results itself.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
